temporal_description:
A close-up shot focuses on a man with graying hair, wearing a light blue collared shirt and a striped tie. He is looking down, seemingly eating or preparing to eat, with a focused expression. In the blurred background, another man in a dark shirt is visible. The setting appears to be an indoor space, possibly an office or a breakroom, with a cool, blue-toned lighting. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera is slightly shaky, suggesting handheld filming.

The camera cuts to a medium shot of a different man with dark hair, also in a light blue shirt and a striped tie, with a lanyard around his neck. He looks down with a serious and concerned expression. Other people are visible in the blurred background behind him. The "风行网" text remains in the top left corner. The camera remains shaky.

The shot tightens slightly on the second man as he continues to look down, his expression unchanged. The camera movement is still unsteady. The "风行网" text is still visible.

The camera pans slightly to the right, following the man as he begins to move forward. The shot is still a close-up, capturing his determined look. The "风行网" text is present. A man speaks in a serious and slightly agitated tone, his voice firm and direct. He delivers his lines with a sense of finality and a hint of warning, as if he has just discovered something important and is about to reveal it. The background is filled with the low, indistinct murmur of other people talking and the subtle sounds of movement, suggesting a busy office or a group of people gathered in a room.

The camera angle shifts, showing the man from a slightly different perspective as he continues to move through the group. The "风行网" text is still on screen.

The camera pans down, revealing the first man with graying hair again. He is now seen from the side, sitting at a table and eating from a white bowl with chopsticks. Other people are seated around the table with him, also eating. The "风行网" text is visible in the top left corner. The shot is a medium close-up, capturing the casual dining atmosphere.

**Dialogue:**
"我们查清楚了，你两个手下在沙滩那吹风。" (We've figured it out. Your two subordinates were gossiping at the beach.)
